market_overview.headline: Market structure shows divergent signals with SPY holding bull structure while QQQ breaks down and BTC remains deeply bearish.
market_overview.detail: SPY in bull pullback to 21W support but facing crossover risks, QQQ unstacked bearish with 8W below 13W, and BTC in full bear structure down 15% from 21W. Only 35% of stocks in Full Bull vs 20% in Full Bear.

reversal_candidates.headline: Bear Rally Reversal Candidates (with bullish crossover alerts)

items.name: Intercontinental Exchange Inc.
items.crossover_detail: 8W just below 13W (0.08%) — bullish cross potential; 13W just below 21W (0.30%) — bullish cross potential
items.note: Strong financial exchange showing relative strength with both key EMA crossovers setting up bullish.

items.name: Apple Inc.
items.note: Mega-cap tech showing early reversal signals with 8W about to cross above 13W.

items.note: AI leader with mixed crossover signals but 8W showing early bullish momentum.

items.note: Memory giant in solid uptrend, offering pullback entry with strong analyst support.

items.name: Merck & Company, Inc.
items.note: Defensive pharma play offering quality pullback entry in steady uptrend structure.

momentum_themes.headline: Momentum Acceleration Leaders
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology and producer manufacturing showing strongest momentum with GLW leading at 18.5 spread score. Energy and materials continue outperformance while tech remains mixed.

sector_analysis.headline: Sector Rotation Analysis

strongest.note: Perfect bullish alignment with all 9 names in bull structure averaging 13% above 21W.
Metals and mining showing complete bullish structure with strong 12% average performance.
Industrial chemicals maintaining perfect bullish alignment in commodity supercycle.

weakest.note: Tech services in severe bear structure with 90% bearish, down 8% on average.
Complete bearish breakdown in commercial services with all names underwater.
Financial sector showing net bearish bias despite some bank strength.

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth tech into cyclical value with energy, materials, and industrials leading while software and fintech lag significantly.

items.text: SPY crossover risks with 8W only 0.21% above 13W and 13W just 0.89% above 21W
QQQ already broken with 8W below 13W, suggesting continued tech weakness
BTC full bear structure down 15% from 21W indicating risk-off sentiment persists
35 bull breakdowns signal deteriorating uptrend quality across broad market
